title: elaphoglossum nilgiricum
intro: Elaphoglossum nilgiricum is a species of epiphytic fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae, native to the Western Ghats in India. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which are attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum nilgiricum include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, digestive issues, and skin infections, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions or decoctions, which are believed to promote overall well-being and provide relief from various health conditions.
